title: spiesia pumila
intro: Spiesia pumila, also known as Dwarf Spiesia, is a low-growing perennial herb native to the Himalayan region and the Indian subcontinent. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower fever and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Spiesia pumila include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
